description_long: This house features a single-story layout with a broad, rectangular footprint and a prominent red-tiled hip roof. The exterior walls are finished in a mix of yellow and beige tones, with a textured brown section on one side. The main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch supported by two dark columns and a small set of steps, providing a welcoming focal point. Several rectangular windows are distributed along the visible facades, with an asymmetrical arrangement that adds visual interest. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from masonry or concrete, with a tiled roof and standard residential doors and windows. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story house with a red-tiled hip roof, yellow and beige exterior walls, and a covered porch entryway supported by columns. The house features asymmetrically placed rectangular windows and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, two dark columns, and a small set of steps, along with a mix of yellow and beige walls and several windows.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the large expanse of the red-tiled roof, a textured brown wall, and minimal window or door openings.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a long yellow wall with several evenly spaced rectangular windows and a brown side wall, with no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Angled view of the house's side and front, showing the yellow wall with windows, the covered porch, and the main entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with two dark columns, small set of steps, and a simple door
